message:
feat(fusion,fsfs,index,embed): optimize blending with borrowed references, harden scoring, and expand test coverage

- Refactor blend HashMap from owned String keys to borrowed &str references,
  eliminating clone() calls in the hot fusion path
- Rename build_rank_map() → build_borrowed_rank_map() for API clarity
- Refactor Kendall Tau and merge-sort inversions to use in-place scratch
  buffers instead of per-call Vec allocations
- Replace cast truncations with try_from and saturating arithmetic for safety
- Add ~350 lines of preference rank tests for embedding model registry
  covering minilm-384 ranking, unknown model fallback, and directory mapping
- Add ~330 lines of PhaseObservation and LatencyDecomposition edge-case tests
  for query latency optimization budget utilization
- Remove unused OpportunityMatrix import from query_latency_optimization
- Harden top-k selection and scoring paths in vector search
- Clean up formatting in phase budget comments and filter chains

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
